candidate_answers.text: Understood. You want to return only the water bottle from order #W6390527 and send the refund to PayPal, so I can process that return now.

The user has changed course from exchange to return, and the visible state already identifies the delivered order, item, and refund destination, so the next grounded action is to submit a delivered-item return.

provenance.source_type: manual annotation from real tau2 episode
provenance.decision_rule: Choose a retail user turn where the user reverses an earlier exchange flow and gives final approval for a single-item return on a delivered order.
provenance.scoring_method: Manual one-step proxy scoring from visible state. Scores prioritize the already-specified return execution over more exploratory or irrelevant actions.
notes: The query is the user’s final approval message, not hidden task text.
history_summary retains the earlier exchange discussion because it is relevant context for why return_delivered_order_items now supersedes exchange_delivered_order_items.
best_action is return_delivered_order_items because the user now wants only the delivered water bottle returned.
